source: # AEMO_Bronze_NMI_METERS_FullHistory
full_history_electricity_nmi_meters_23249 = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

# Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col,
    concat,
    concat_ws,
    current_timestamp,
    date_format,
    hash,
    lit,
    regexp_replace,
    sha2,
    to_timestamp,
)

from pyspark.sql.types import (
    BooleanType,
    DateType,
    DecimalType,
    DoubleType,
    IntegerType,
    StringType,
    StructField,
    StructType,
    TimestampType,
)

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Bronze_MSATS_FullHistory"
lake_db_name = "aemo_bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch


#Get Current Date
#Bronze_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
# Table: msats_nmi_meters: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="msats_nmi_meters"

#Create Bronze Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	ParticipantId STRING,
	SequenceNumber INT,
	CreationDate TIMESTAMP,
	MaintenanceDate TIMESTAMP,
	RowStatus STRING,
	FromDate TIMESTAMP,
	ToDate TIMESTAMP,
	NMI STRING,
	SerialNumber STRING,
	Location STRING,
	Hazard STRING,
	InstallationTypeCode STRING,
	Use STRING,
	Manufacturer STRING,
	Model STRING,
	LastTestDate DATE,
	TestResult STRING,
	ReadTypeCode STRING,
	NextScheduledReadDate DATE,
	Status STRING,
	CurrentTransformerType STRING,
	CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable STRING,
	CurrentTransformerRatioConnected STRING,
	CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass STRING,
	CurrentTransformerTest STRING,
	CurrentTransformerTestDate DATE,
	CurrentTransformerLocation STRING,
	VoltageTransformerType STRING,
	VoltageTransformerRatio STRING,
	VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass STRING,
	VoltageTransformerTest STRING,
	VoltageTransformerTestDate DATE,
	VoltageTransformerLocation STRING,
	Latitude DECIMAL(10 ,7),
	Longitude DECIMAL(10, 7),
	FileName STRING,
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	HashKey STRING 
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# load parquet file as dataframe
raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}/')

# Add CDC columns
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("FileName", lit("Snapshot Report data Full Refresh"))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||","ParticipantId","SequenceNumber"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# insert the source data to target bronze table
spark.sql(f"""
        INSERT INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
            (
                ParticipantId,
                SequenceNumber,
                CreationDate,
                MaintenanceDate,
                RowStatus,
                FromDate,
                ToDate,
                NMI,
                SerialNumber,
                Location,
                Hazard,
                InstallationTypeCode,
                Use,
                Manufacturer,
                Model,
                LastTestDate,
                TestResult,
                ReadTypeCode,
                NextScheduledReadDate,
                Status,
                CurrentTransformerType,
                CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable,
                CurrentTransformerRatioConnected,
                CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass,
                CurrentTransformerTest,
                CurrentTransformerTestDate,
                CurrentTransformerLocation,
                VoltageTransformerType,
                VoltageTransformerRatio,
                VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass,
                VoltageTransformerTest,
                VoltageTransformerTestDate,
                VoltageTransformerLocation,
                Latitude,
                Longitude,
                FileName,
                CDCLoadDate,
                HashKey
            )
        SELECT
                s.ParticipantId,
                s.SequenceNumber,
                s.CreationDate,
                s.MaintenanceDate,
                s.RowStatus,
                s.FromDate,
                s.ToDate,
                s.NMI,
                s.SerialNumber,
                s.Location,
                s.Hazard,
                s.InstallationTypeCode,
                s.Use,
                s.Manufacturer,
                s.Model,
                s.LastTestDate,
                s.TestResult,
                s.ReadTypeCode,
                s.NextScheduledReadDate,
                s.Status,
                s.CurrentTransformerType,
                s.CurrentTransformerRatioAvailable,
                s.CurrentTransformerRatioConnected,
                s.CurrentTransformerAccuracyClass,
                s.CurrentTransformerTest,
                s.CurrentTransformerTestDate,
                s.CurrentTransformerLocation,
                s.VoltageTransformerType,
                s.VoltageTransformerRatio,
                s.VoltageTransformerAccuracyClass,
                s.VoltageTransformerTest,
                s.VoltageTransformerTestDate,
                s.VoltageTransformerLocation,
                s.Latitude,
                s.Longitude,
                s.FileName,
                s.CDCLoadDate,
                s.HashKey
        FROM temp_table s;
#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = 0
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre)
Bronze_Delete = 0
Bronze_ActiveRows = 0 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_Insert_Post

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables
log_data = [(lake_db_name,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

# Cleanup Raw Files 
raw_output_path = f"abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}/"
mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
